name: Create SWOT Analysis Template
description: A school principal needs a template for a staff meeting about a new '1:1 Device Program'. Create a 1-page ActivInspire flipchart with a SWOT analysis matrix layout. The flipchart must include the title '1:1 Device Program SWOT' at the top and a 2x2 grid structure dividing the page into four quadrants. Label the quadrants 'Strengths' (top-left), 'Weaknesses' (top-right), 'Opportunities' (bottom-left), and 'Threats' (bottom-right). Save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/swot_template.flipchart.
